assertions.source_quote: create an account at the [sign-up page](https://console.apify.com/sign-up).
To sign in to your account, visit the [sign-in page](https://console.apify.com/sign-in).
go to the [Login & Privacy](https://console.apify.com/settings/security) section of your account settings.
After you click the **Sign up** button, we will send you a verification email.

assertions.page_context: Email verification page reached after sign-up flow
assertions.source_quote: On the verification page, you can click on the **Resend verification email** button to send the email again.
click the **Continue with Google** or **Continue with GitHub** buttons.
click the **Continue with Google** or **Continue with GitHub** buttons.
**Recently viewed**: Displays Actors you have recently accessed.
**Suggested Actors for you**: Recommends Actors that might interest you based on your and other users' recent activities.
**Actor runs**: Shows your recent Actor runs, as well as scheduled runs and tasks.

assertions.page_context: Apify Store section accessible from left-side panel
assertions.source_quote: | [Apify Store](/platform/console/store) | <kbd>G</kbd> + <kbd>O</kbd> | Search for Actors that suit your web-scraping needs. |

assertions.page_context: Actors section accessible from left-side panel

assertions.source_quote: | [Proxy](/platform/proxy) | <kbd>G</kbd> + <kbd>P</kbd> | View your proxy usage and credentials. |
